hero.eyebrow: AI hiring and skill development for India's kitchens
hero.headline: The hat is earned. Not issued.
hero.subheadline: White Hat helps India's informal culinary workforce get discovered fairly through AI station-fit matching, profile-building support, and chef-side readiness coaching.

highlights: AI station-fit search ranks chefs from a natural-language kitchen brief instead of relying on exact matches alone
Chef-side profile drafting turns informal kitchen stories into structured, reviewable profile data
Readiness scoring gives workers specific coaching on how to become more discoverable and hireable
The platform keeps White Hat's premium Indian visual language while making AI functional at the workflow core

businessSignals.title: Fairer chef discovery
businessSignals.body: Employers can describe the real kitchen need in plain language and still surface strong blue-collar talent without polished resumes.

businessSignals.title: Skill-development evidence
businessSignals.body: Every chef can convert informal work history into structured proof, then get coaching on what to add next for better visibility.

businessSignals.title: Full-stack deployability
businessSignals.body: Semantic matching, profile extraction, explanations, and readiness feedback all run through real API routes that deploy on Vercel.
